Studio

One builder.
Four systems.

The Omniarch isn't an agency — it's one person building across code, interactive worlds, visual identity, and video, with the same hand and the same standard every time.

00 — Code

Web applications, product interfaces, and the tooling that holds them up. Built end-to-end — front-end, logic, and deployment.

01 — Worlds

Original fiction, built into software — interactive reading systems, not just manuscripts. See The Legends of Ren Zu below.

02 — Design & Channel

Brand systems, type, and layout — plus original video commentary on webnovels and manhwa, published as GodofPeakFiction.

The Legends of Ren Zu
thelegendsofrenzu.theomniarch.com.ng
Featured Build

An original tragedy — Ren Zu bartering his essence to conquer Fate — built into a standalone, illustrated reading app, not just written as text. Narrative system, layout, and interface designed and shipped as one piece of software.

44Chapters
1Standalone app
